g.text: What Happens If Order Is WRONG?

div.p: Critical sequence that prevents torn pages and ensures ACID Key: fsync(journal) MUST happen BEFORE writing to database

g.text: Load page from disk to memory
This fsync GUARANTEES journal has backup BEFORE database is modified

ol.li: Write MODIFIED to database ← CRASH HERE

g.text: Fix: fsync(journal) MUST be step 5 (before database write)
Recovery: Use old database (transaction rolled back)
Journal has original, DB may be partially written
Recovery: Restore original from journal, rollback
